name: Eblana
description:
“My moral compass leaving my body the moment a villain provokes my carnal urges.”

Caster Operator Necrass from Arknights. Eblana Dublinn, R.I. codename "Necrass", is the older twin sister of Loughshinny Dublinn (Reed), born in County Oak Grove to the house of Dublinn, the Draco founding families of Tara and the direct descendant of the Gaeilic Kings. Necrass is also one of the bosses in Episode 12 under her real name Eblana, and overall an antagonist (who killed many innocent civilians).

Which is exactly why we recruited her as an Operator!

Given that Eblana is now announced to be an Operator, I present to you the first rendition of the Eblana bot. I'll likely update her whenever she rolls around to global, which is like... half a year into the future. Enjoy your ANOTHER warcrime-commiting waifu.

doctor there is only one way to stop this woman from commiting more atrocities: wholesome seggs
creator: Anarchy_Shu
